title: Mamit District Monitoring Committee for Bana Kaih Scheme thukhawm
content:
4726/2025-2026

Dated: Mamit the 6th of March,2026:Vawiin khan DC Conference Hall, Mamit-ah District Monitoring Committee for Bana Kaih Scheme chứ Pi Carolyn LB Khiangte, Addl DC hoin an thukhawm.

Pi Carolyn LB Khiangte chuan Bana Kaih chu Sawkar flagship scheme a nihna angin line department te ngaipawimawh turin a chah a, progress partner te nen tha taka thawk ho tur leh harsatna an neih pawha sutkian dan kawng ngaihtuah sak turin a chah.

He hưnah hian Chief Minister Special Package Phase II chu 12th March, 2026 semna hun neih nise tia rel niin line department ten an progress partner te chu semna huna ken ngai leh a tul dangte hriattir tura ngen an ni a,briefing program hmanpui tura tih an ni bawk. Hemi bakah hian District level workshop on Handholding Scheme ni 16th March,2026 neih tura ruahman chu sawi ho niin chanvo nei department te chuan an mawhphurna tha taka hlen tura chah an ni.

Attachment

title: Vice President Arrives in Mizoram to Grace the 20th Convocation of Mizoram University
content:
537/2025-2026

Aizawl, the 6th March, 2026:Hon'ble Vice President of India, Shri C.P. Radhakrishnan, arrived in Mizoram this afternoon on his maiden visit to the state since assuming office. He is scheduled to be the Chief Guest at the 20th Convocation of Mizoram University (MZU) tomorrow.

Upon arrival at Lengpui Airport, the Hon'ble Vice President Shri C.P. Radhakrishnan was warmly received by the Governor of Mizoram, General (Dr) Vijay Kumar Singh, PVSM, AVSM, YSM (Retd), along with School Education Minister Dr. Vanlalthlana and other senior officials. He was also accorded a ceremonial guard of honour.

Later, upon reaching Lok Bhavan, he was accorded a ceremonial welcome by the Governor General (Dr) Vijay Kumar Singh, Chief Minister Pu Lalduhoma, Home Minister Pu K. Sapdanga, Animal Husbandry & Veterinary Minister Pu C. Lalsawivunga, and other dignitaries.

This evening, the Government of Mizoram will host a special cultural programme followed by a dinner in honour of the Hon'ble Vice President Shri C.P. Radhakrishnan at the Lok Bhavan.

Tomorrow, he will grace the 20th Convocation of Mizoram University as the Chief Guest. Following the event, the Hon'ble Vice President will depart from Mizoram to attend the 14th Convocation of Tripura University as the Chief Guest.

Attachment

title: Lungleiah Healthy Lunglei App tihchangtlun dan tur leh tihlar dan tur sawi ho a ni
content:
4725/2025-2026

Lunglei, 2026 Vau thla ni 6:Vawiin khan DC Office, Health & FW leh I&PR official-te leh LushAITech ai awhte chu Lunglei District Bawrhsap Pi Navneet Mann kaihhruaiin a hna thawh pindanah an ṭhu khawm a. "Healthy Lunglei District Campaign" kal tlanga January ni 29, 2026-a tlangzarh tak, "LushAI Healthy Lunglei" (LHL) Mobile App chu mipuite'n ṭangkai zawka an hman theih nana tihchangtlun dan tur leh tihlar dan tur an sawi ho.

Thawktute leh mipuite'n LushAI Healthy Lunglei app an hman dan report ngaihthlak niin, LushAITech lam aṭangin app tihchangtlunna kawnga an hma lak dan report ngaihthlak a ni bawk a. App kal tlanga doctor appointment late'n hriattirna an dawn theih dan tur te, doctor leh damdawi dawrte'n anmahni dawrtu an awm tih hriattirna an dawn theih dan tur te, damdawi chah duhte'n dawr hlat zawng leh a phurhna man ngai zat an hriat nghal theih dan tur te, damdawi leh a kaihhnawih chah theih dah belh dan tur te, doctor-in damdawi a chawhna lehkha app-a dah luh dan tur leh app hmangtute puitu AI chatbot tihchangtlun dan tura rawtna leh hma lak dan tur hrang hrang sawi ho a ni a. LushAITech lam chuan app viltu bik an indah thu leh rawtna hrang hrang hmangin a tah tawla app an tihchangtlun zel thu an sawi.

Healthy Lunglei app hi Android Playstore aṭangin mi 370, Apple iOS App Store aṭangin mi 30, belh khawmin mi 400-in an phone-ah an dah lut (download) tawh tih tar lan a ni a. App kal tlang hian Civil Hospital Lungleiah mi 48 leh PHC hrang hrangah mi 70 bawr vel chu damdawi ina inentir tura an inziah luh tawh thu te, ABHA ID siam nan te pawh hman a nih thu te tar lan a ni a. Healthy Lunglei app hi mi tam zawkin an hman ṭangkai theih nan thlalak leh lem che hmanga tihlar leh branch YMA leh college zirlaite zinga inzirtir kalpui tura rel a ni a. Bawrhsap chuan a taka app hman ṭangkai dan enfiah turin March ni 11 leh ni 12-ah te damdawi in hrang hrang tlawhin, May 2026-ah damdawi in hrang hrangah LHL app kal tlanga inziak luta NCD endikna kalpui tum a ni a. App hman ṭhat kawnga YMA branch leh college te inelna chu May 2026-ah buatsaih tum a ni bawk.

LushAI Healthy Lunglei app hmang hian district chhunga sawrkar damdawi in leh health centre-a daktawrte ṭhut hun tur a en theih bakah, OPD-a inentir turin appointment a lak lawk (book) theih a. ABHA-a inziah luhna te, he app-a inziak lut damdawi dawr (pharmacy)-te aṭanga damdawi chah theihna te awmin, hriselna lama hriat tur pawimawh hrang hrangte pawh awlsam takin a hmuh theih a. OPD appointment laknaa pui thei tur leh zawhna hrang hrang Mizo ṭawnga chhang thei tur AI chatbot dah tel a ni bawk a. Android hmangte tanhttps://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.lushaihealthylunglei.androidaṭangin leh iOS hmangte tanhttps://apps.apple.com/in/app/lhl/id6755673586aṭangin download theih a ni.

Attachment

title: Mizoram University Convocation hmanpui turin Vice President-in Mizoram a lo thleng
content:
4724/2025-2026

Aizawl, the 6th March, 2026:Mizoram University (MZU) Convocation vawi 20-na Khuallian ni a hmanpui turin Vice President Pu C.P. Radhakrishnan chuan vawiin chawhnu khan Mizoram a lo thleng. Tun hi Vice President a nih hnua Mizoram a lo tlawh hmasak ber a ni.

Vice President hi Lengpui Airport-ah Larsap General (Dr) Vijay Kumar Singh, PVSM, AVSM, YSM (Retd), School Education Minister Dr. Vanlalthlana leh official dangte'n an lo hmuak a. Lok Bhavan-a lo thlenin Larsap bakah Chief Minister Pu Lalduhoma, Home Minister Pu K. Sapdanga, AH& Vety. Minister Pu C. Lalsawivunga leh official dangte'n an lo dawngsawng a ni.

Zanin hian Mizoram Sawrkar chuan Vice President pual hian Lok Bhavan-ah Cultural Programme leh zanriah a buatsaih dawn a. Naktuk hian Mizoram University Convocation vawi 20-na Khuallian niin a hmanpui ang a. Hemi hnu hian Tripura University Convocation vawi 14-na hmanpui turin Mizoram a chhuahsan ang.

Attachment

title: Hnahthial District-a Hmeichhia harsatna tawkte tan Free Legal Public Hearing nei dawn
content:
4723/2025-2026

Dated Hnahthial, the 6thMarch, 2026:

Mizoram State Commission for Women-Press Release On International Women's Day, 2026 "Mahila Jan Sunwai"

International Women's Day denchhenin National Commission for Women, New Delhi leh State Commission for Women chuan India Ram pumah "Mahila Jan Sunwal" a buatsaih dawn a.International Women's Day hi Hnahthial District ah Dt. 11thMarch, 2026 ah hun hman tur niin he hun hi Mizoram State Commission for Women mai bakah Deputy Commissioner, Superintendent of Police, District Legal Services Authority leh Women and Child Development ten an buatsaih ho dawn a. He hun hi Rebeck Lalruatdiki Khiangte, Member, Mizoram State Commission for Women in a hmanpui dawn a ni.

Hmeichhia dikna chanvo rahbehna hrang hrang tuarte chuan he hunah hian complain a thehluh theih dawn a. Inchhungkhura hleilenna, eng kawng pawha tawkte, nupa kar harsatna avanga hmeichhe chunga tawrhna thleng te, hnathawhna hmuna thawhpui mipate atanga harsatna tawk te, chhaih nawmnah tawkte leh eng kawng pawha hmeichhia nihna avanga hleilenna leh nek chepna tawk tan harsatna a thlen theih ang.

Free Legal Public hearing neih tur a ni a, Complain thehlut duh te chuan Child Development Project Officer, WCD, Deputy Commissioner leh SP te hnen ah ziakin theh luh tur a ni.

Complain thehlut te tan hemi ni hian a rang thei ang bera an harsatna te chinfel nghal tum a ni.

Hetiang lama harsatna nei te tan a hnuaia phone number tarlanah hian hriattir theih a ni e.

1) Child Developmet Project Officer - 8974964678

2) Protection Officer, DHEW - 9862846762

title: Champhai Bawrhsapin MCS (Combined) Exam tling tharte kawm
content:
4722/2025-2026

Champhai, dated 6th March 2026:Vawiin chawhnu dar 2 khan DC Conference Hall, Champhaiah Champhai Bawrhsap Pu Mohammad Aaquib chuan Mizoram Civil Service (Combined) Examination-a Champhai atanga tling pahnih, Lalhmingthanga, MIS a tling leh Zarzoliana, MPS a tling te chu kawmin lawmpuina thilpek a hlan.

Bawrhsap chuan he exam har tak paltlanga Mizoram sawrkara hna pawimawh tak an thawk thei tur hi ropui a tih thu sawiin an chhuanawm a tih thu a sawi a, Champhai leh Mizoram tana mi hman tlak leh mi rintlak tak ni turin duhsakna a hlan a ni. Bawrhsap hian lawmpuina thilpek leh plaque a hlan bawk a ni.

He hun zawhah hian sawrkar exam hrang hrang atan inzirtirna (coaching) kal mek, EAST Champs hnuaia zirlaite nen tling tharte hian inkawmna hun an hmang nghal a ni.

Attachment

title: Champhaiah sangha khawitute tan training buatsaih
content:
4721/2025-2026

Champhai, dated 6th March 2026:Vawiin chawhma dar 11 khan Nature Conservation Centre (NLC)-Mizoram, EF & CC Department buatsaihin ‘One Day Workshop on Nature Conservation and Climate Resilient Livelihood Opportunities (Fish Farming)’ chu CF Auditorium, EF & CC Complex, Champhai Bethelah hlawhtling taka buatsaih a ni. He workshop ah hian Champhai district huam chhunga khaw hrang hrang atangin fish farmer mi sawmsarih (70) vel an tel a ni.

He workshop-ah hian Pu Lalbiakchama Chawngthu, Champhai DFO & Member Secretary, NLC Advisory Board chuan Wildlife Conservation & Impact of Climate Change tih thupui hmangin zirtirna a pe a, Mizorama nungcha kan la neih te humhalh an pawimawh zia leh Mizoram biodiversity chu kan thil hlu ber te zinga mi a nih avangin nasa zawka humhalh a pawimawh zia a sawi a. Wildlife Protection Act, 1972 chungchangah mipuite hriat tur pawimawhte zirtirna a pe bawk. Hei bakah hian ramngaw kan tih chereu avanga harsatna kan tawh langsar tak mai tuihna tlem tial tial chu pumpelh turin ramngaw humhalh a pawimawhzia uar takin a tarlang a ni.

Pi Lalrosangpuii, Champhai DFDO, Fisheries Department chuan Serious Fish Farming tih thupui hmangin zirtirna a pe a, sangha khawi chungchanga hriat tur pawimawh chi hrang hrang zirtirna pe in, composite fish farming chungchang te, farm pond chi hrang hrang leh kan ram tualto sanghate humhalh turin luidung humhalh a pawimawh thu a tarlang bawk a ni. Tin, fish farming chu tih takzeta kalpui a nih chuan eizawnna hlawk tak a ni thu a tarlang. Tin, kalkhawmte hnenah fish farming chu taima leh serious zawka kalpui theuh turin a sawm bawk a ni.

Attachment

title: HDFC CSR FUND ATANGA EMRS 7-A SMART CLASSROOM SIAM HAWNNA NEI
content:
4720/2025-2026

Dated Aizawl, the 6th March, 2026:Vawiin khan Mizoram EMRS Society, Planning & Programme Implementation Department hnuaia enkawl Eklavya Model Residential Schools pasarih - Lunglei, Serchhip, Bilkhawthlir, Noaohtlah , Tlangnuam, Tlungvel, Zawlnuamahte HDFC Bank CSR Fund atanga smart classrooms dah tharte chu Pu Vanlaldina Fanai, Member Secretary, Mizoram EMRS Society, Commissioner, Planning and Programme Implementation (P&PI) Department ni bawk chuan a hawng.

Pu Vanlaldina Fanai chuan HDFC Bank hmalakna chu fakawm a tih thu sawiin, tunlai khawvelah technology leh digital literacy a pawimawh tawh zia a tarlang a, chu chu HDFC Bank-te chuan hmu thiama, bengvar taka hetiang tih nachang an hria hi lawmawm a tih thu leh thil entawntlak tak a nih thu a sawi a. Heng smart classroom-te hi EMRS-te tan zirna kawnga hmasawnna rahbi pawimawh tak a ni, a ti a. Corporate sector leh sawrkar thawh dunna tha tak chuan rah duhawm tak a chhuah ngei ringin, zirlai leh zirtirtute pawhin tangkai taka zirna lama hmasawn nan an hman theih ngei a beisei thu a sawi bawk.

He hawnna programme hi Pi Chingthanmawi Guite, CEO, Mizoram EMRS Society, Adviser cum Joint Secretary, P&PI Department nib awk chuan a kaihruai a, Dr. Lalrinchhana, Principal Adviser, P&PI Department leh officer dang leh staff-te an tel bawk a ni. He hun hi HDFC lama an hotu, Pu Kaushik Sharma, Zonal Head leh a thawhpuiten an hmanpui bawk.

HDFC Bank hian December ni 6, 2024 khan EMRS pali - Chawngte, Lawngtlai, Ngopa leh Tuipangahte smart classroom lo pe tawhin, tuna School pasariha hma an lak leh nen hian Mizoram EMRS zawng zawngah (school 11) smart classroom hi dah kim vek tawh a ni.

title: AGRICULTURE MINISTER-IN DISTRICT PARIATA CHIN TUR TUNG CHI KG 4500 A VAI LIAM
content:
4719/2025-2026

Dated Aizawl, 6th March 2026:Vawiin khan Agriculture & Farmers Welfare Minister Pu P.C Vanlalruata'n Mizoram district pariata chin tur Tung chi Kg 4500 a vai liam. Tung chi vai liamna hun hi Directorate of Agriculture & Farmers Welfare Office, Aizawl-ah hman niin Agriculture Department Secretary Pi Ramdinliani’n a kaihruai a, India rama Tung lei leh hralh lama hmalatu lian, Himanshu Bansal, Vorya Enterprise, New Delhi pawh biakhmuhtheihna kaltlangin he hunah hian rawn telin Agriculture Department-a thawkte leh Tung chingtu mi eng emaw zat an tel bawk a ni.

Agriculture Minister chuan loneitute din chhuah theihna tur chu a thil vei ber a nih thu sawiin Tung chin chu Mizote rilru sukthlek nena inmil, Mizoram leilung mil bawk si a nih avangin loneitute tan thil tih chi tak a nih tur thu a sawi a. ‘Kum 1990 chhoah sawrkar hmalaknain Mizoram hmun hrang hrangah nasa taka chin lo ni tawh thin mah se a hralhna kawngah tunlai angin khawl leh inbiakpawhnate a la that tawk loh avangin a hlawhtling ta lo a ni’ a ti a. Tunah India ramah Tung hriak (Tung oil) mamawhna a san zel thu leh a tam zawk chu ram dang atanga lak luh vek an nih avangin Mizorama kut hna thawktute tan Tung chin chu tharthawh leh tlak nia a hriat thu sawiin, kum 2025 atang khan Agriculture department kaltlangin Saitual, Khawzawl leh Serchhip district-ahte awmze nei zawka chin tan leh a nih thu a sawi a. Kum 2026 ah phei chuan zau zawkin district 8-a khaw 105-ahte chin a nih tur thu a sawiin Agriculture department-a thawktute chu Farmer-te tan thahnem ngaia, uar lehzuala zirtirnate kalpui thin turin a chah bawk a ni.

Vawiin hun hmannaah hian Agriculture Joint Director (Crops) Pi Lalramhluni hnen atangin Technical Report ngaihthlak a ni a; Pu Himanshu Bansal, Vorya Enterprise, chuan India ramah tung lei tur duhkhawp an hmuh zawh loh avangin China leh Vietnam atangtea an lei nasat thu a sawi a; tunlai khawvel Oil mamawhna sang chho zelah Tung chingtute tan a hralhna kawngah harsatna a awm loh tur thu sawiinTung lei tura farmer-te nen inremna siam a duh thu pawh a sawi bawk a ni.

Tung hriak hi bungrua (furniture) tih tletna atan te, varnish, paints leh leather tih tletna atan te leh thil dang hrang hrangah an hmang nasa hle a; chin a nih atanga kum 3 bawr velah an rah tan thei a, kum 30 bawr vel thleng an rah thei a ni. A kung karlakah hian thlai dang Vaimim leh Behliangte chin theih bawkin heng Vaimim leh Behliangte hi Central sawrkar ruahman angin NAFED/NCC ten Minimum Support Price (MSP) in an lei thei bawk a ni.

Attachment

title: PU S. LALREMTHANGA, DY. CEM, MADC-IN SIAHA DISTRICT MIZORAM UPA PAWL ASSEMBLY-A HMANPUI
content:
4718/2025-2026

Dated Siaha, the 6 March 2026:Vawiin chawhma dar 11:00AM khan I&PR Conference Hall, Council Vaih; Siahaah Mizoram Upa Pawl Siaha district Assembly vawi 4-na neih a ni a, Pu S. Lalremthanga, Deputy CEM, MADC chuan Khuallian niin a hmanpui a, Pi LS. Lalbiakzuali, District Social Welfare officer, Siaha district chu khualzahawm a ni.

Pu S. Lalremthanga, Deputy CEM, MADC chuan a politics zinkawngah pawl hrang hrangin khuallian atan an sawm ṭhin thu leh, “Mizoram Upa Pawl anga hun vawng dik a la tawn loh thu a sawi.” Upa pawl kal khawmte chu rilru lam tih naupan an zir ṭhaa a hriat thu sawiin, rilru hian nasa takin kan taksa a thunun avangin rilru hrisel nei chhunzawm zel turin kal khawmte duhsakna a hlan.

Kum sawmriat chunglam tamna khua reng reng chu mi harsa tete pawh nise khaw zahawm leh Pathian hriatpui khawpa malsawmna dawng khua an nia a hriat thu khuallian hian a sawi rualin Upate chu rilru fim pu, hun tawnin a tihfin tawh leh thuhnu dawn nachang hria an nih tawh avangin ṭhangtharte tan nundan mawi leh awmdan ṭha zirtirtu ni turin a chah bawk.

Khual zahawm Pi LS Lalbiakzuali, District Social Welfare officer, Siaha district pawhin Mizoram Upa Pawl member kal khawmte chu Upa pawl member-a inziaklut thei tura damna an chang chu vannei a tiin a lawmpui thu a sawi rualin, “Nangmahni neitu kan ni hi kan vannei ve bawk” a ti. Ṭhalaite ruihhloin a tihbuai nasatzia leh chhuan lo la awm zel turte ngaihtuah reng chungin anmahni chhanchhuak tura Upate theihna hi a tlem loh thu sawiin, “Ram changkang apiangah upate an zahin an zalen a, an zahawmna pawh humhim a ni,” chuvangin “khawlai dungah emaw puipunna hmunah emaw ṭhalai ruih neih inhmuh chuan dinchilh ula, sawipui ula; an saltanna bawih aṭanga khaichhuah i tum tlang ang u,” tiin kalkhawmte a sawm bawk.

Vawiin hun hman hi Pu C. Sangnuaia, President, MUP Siaha district-in a kaihruai a, assembly-a kal kum 80 chunglam mi 12 hnenah Pi LS Lalbiakzuali, District Social Welfare officer, Siaha district-in lawmpuina thilpek a hlan. Dr. Ruthi Laldinpuii, Medical Officer (Ayush), District Hospital Siaha chuan hriselna kawnga upate inenkawl dan tur sawiin, H. Vanlaltluangi, P&SM Instructor, District Hospital Siaha-in mahni inchhungkhura taksa an sawizawi dan tur zirtirin a tihpui bawk. Rev. C. Valy chuan lawmthu sawina neiin hun hman tihtawp a ni.

Attachment

title: LAWNGTLAI BAWRHSAP IN CHAPCHAR KUT 2026 TUICHAWNG GROUP YMA BUATSAIH A HMANPUI
content:
4717/2025-2026

Lawngtlai, 6th March, 2026 :Vawiin chhun dar 12:00 PM khan Tuichawng Group YMA buatsaihin Chapchar Kut 2026 chu YMA Hall, Vathuampuiah hman a ni a. Bawrhsap Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan Kut Pa niin a hmanpui.

Kut Pa Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan Chapchar Kut chhimtu zawng zawngte chibai bukna neiin, Kut Pa tura an sawm avangin Tuchawng Group YMA hruaitute,Pang Student Association hruaitute leh VC Vathuampui te chungah lawmthu a sawi a ni. Tuichawng Group YMA- te a theihna kawng a tanpui a in huam thu leh theih tawp chhuahpui a in huam thu a tarlang a ni.

Bawrhsap chuan Mizoram leh a chhunga District- te chu ruihhlo leh ruihtheih thilah a him lo a, khawtlangah nghawng tha lo tak a nei a ni tiin, a dona kawngah sawrkarin theihtawp a chhuah mek a ni, a ti. Ruihhlo do na lian tak Operation Jericho kalpui mek a nih thu tarlangin, hemi hnuaiah hian Police, Excise, Assam Riifle, Central YLA, MHIP, LWA, LUP leh MUP te nen hmalak ho mek a nih thu a sawi. Ruihhlo laka fihlim tur leh ruihhlo a kiam theih nan ke pe theuh turin kal khawmte a sawm a ni.

Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan kangmei venna kawngah Lawngtlai District- chu a titha ber ni tura hmalak mek a nih thu a sawi a. Ram kang hian environment -tichhiain , nungchate a suat a, boruak a ti chhiaa, chuvangin tul loa ram hal ching thinte hi Village Council- ten zawn chhuah hi an mawh a ni, a titute an phu ang tawk hremna pek a ngai a ni a ti. Sawrkarin lo hal hunte kan bituk a, huan atan leh lo atan ni silo ram kang thin hi a tha lo a ni, chuvangin sorkar thuchhuah te ngai pawimawh turin a chah bawk a ni. Hrisel nan leh khawvel boruak a lo thianghlim a, a lo that zel theih nan YMA kal khawmte kangmei chhuak thelhtu leh ti kangtu ni lo theuh tura fuih bawk.

Kut Pa chuan khawvela hnam ropui Red Indian hnam rothap, hlauh nei lo hnam kha an culture , tradition te humhimna chang an hrelo a, tichuan hnam dang ten an dip ral a, vawiin ni ah chuan a bo tawh a ni, a ti a. Hnam a bo chuan nang pawh i bo ang tiin, khawvel changkang zelah hian kan tawng , kan hnam incheinna, kan hnam lâm te kan vawn nun reng pawimawh hle a ni, a ti . I ram i hnam vawnhimna tha ber chu i culture vawm nun a ni a ti. Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan zo nun ze mawi, tlawmngaihna aia upa zah, inremna leh inpumkhatnate chu chhawm nun zel a pawimawh hle tih sawiin, hemi kawnga theihtawp chhuah zel tura fuihin, Chapchar Kut chhintu zawng zawngte duhsakna a hlan nghal bawk.

Tuichawng Group YMA hnuaiah hian Branch -11 awmin, member - 1254 an awm mek a,  Chapchar Kut programme hi zan lamah hman chhunzawm a ni ang.

title: MIPA LU MEH LEH HMEICHHE SAM TAN TRAINING HAWNG:
content:
4716/2025-2026

Aizawl the 6th March, 2026:Vawiin khan MYC auditorium-ah MYC buatsaih mizo thalai lu meh leh sam tan training tur mipa 28, hmeichhia 12, an vaiin 40 te pualin hun hman a ni. Mipain lu meh training MT CUTS, chaltlangah an nei ang a, hmeichhiain Nuseni beauty parlor, mission vengah an nei thung ang.

Pu Malsawmzuala Ralte, chairman, MYC-in fuihna thu sawiin, "Mizoram sorkar-in mizo thalaite hmakhua a ngaihtuah a, MYC pawhin thalai hna zawng mek te pualin hmalakna chi hrang hrang a kalpui a, kum 2-chhungin MYC kaltlangin mizo thalai 400 chuangin hna an hmu tawh," a ti.

Pu Mala chuan tuna lumeh leh sam tan training-na tur hian TRI angin central-a fund an dil thu a sawi. Tha taka training chhuak, 80% attendance neite chu hand holding kalpuiin, certificate bakah hna an thawh nghal theihna tur lu mehna/sam tanna hmanrua an pe theuh dawn tih a sawi bawk.

Training hi thla 3-chhung neih tura ruahman a ni.

Attachment

title: CHHIARPUI 2027 CHUNGCHANGA GAD THUCHHUAH
content:
4715/2025-2026

Dated Aizawl, the 6th March, 2026 :January ni 7, 2026-a Gazette of India S.O.99(E)-a sawrkar laipui thuchhuah bawhzuiin, Mizoram sawrkar chuan Chhiarpui 2027 (Census of India, 2027) atan In awm zat dinhmun leh a chhunga thil awmte chhinchhiahna (Houselisting Operations) chu April 16 - May 15, 2026 chhungin neih a ni dawn tih a puanga; mimal chanchin leh khawsak dan dinhmun chhiarna (Self enumeration) chu Houselisting Operation tan hmain, April 1-15, 2026 chhungin neih a ni dawn a ni.

title: Champhaiah Chapchar Kut 2026 thlirlawkna nei
content:
4714/2025-2026

Champhai, dated 6th March 2026:Vawiin khan DC Conference Hall, Champhaiah Chapchar Kut 2026 thlirlawkna Champhai Bawrhsap Pu Mohammad Aaquib hovin neih a ni.

He hunah hian Programme Sub Committee Chairman, Sub-Headquarters YMA President Pu Lalrinmuana hnen atangin hmalakna te ngaihthlak a ni a, programme duan dan te, inpuahchahna te leh thil tul dang a sawi lang a ni. Department hrang hrang leh pawl hrang hrang te'n an hmalakna leh mamawh te an sawi khawm bawk a, Chairman Pu Mohammad Aaquib chuan Chapchar Kut hlimawm tak kan hman theih nan theihtawp chhuah turin a sawm a ni.

He hunah hian Champhaia sawrkar hotute leh tlawmngai pawl te an tel a ni.

Chapchar Kut 2026 hi Champhaiah March ni 13 hian chawhma dar 11-ah Zotlang Sports Stadium-ah lawm a ni ang a, Kut Pa chu Adviser to CM (Finance) Pu TBC Lalvenchhunga a ni ang a, Kut Thlengtu hi Champhai Bawrhsap a ni ang. A lawmnaah hian zaithiam milar sawm an ni bakah YMA te, MHIP te, MUP te hnen atangin costume parade, cheraw, chheihlam leh intihhlimna chi hrang hrang a awm ang a, Chapchar Kut Concert MZI-in an buatsaih bawk ang.

Attachment

title: Hnahthial Bazar Kawn atanga NH-02 panna kawng siam dawn avangin Road Block Puang
content:
4713/2025-2026

Dated Hnahthial, the 3rdMarch, 2026:

NOTIFICATION

Hnahthial Bazar kawn atanga NH-02 pan na PWD kawngpui chu alkatra hmanga a siam that a ni dawn a, kawng repair hna hi chak tak leh tha tak a thawh a nih theih nan SDO, PWD, Hnahthial Sub Division-I chuan ziak in Road Block SP, Hnahthial hnenah a rawn dil a.

Helai kawng pawimawh tak hi tlo leh tha tak a siam a nih theih nan Gov't of Mizoram Notification No.12021/10/2004/TRF Dt 27.5.2020 in Mv Act Sec 115 R/W Gov't of Mizoram, Home Department Memo No.A.19018/294/2008-HMP Dt 12thApril, 2022 hmang a lirthei tlandan tur khuahkhirhna siamthei tura thuneihna min pek angin Dt 06.03.2026 (Zirtawpni) zing dar 10:00 am atanga tlai dar 5 pm thlengin Pu RTC Lalsangluaia In, Kanaan veng Junction leh Bazar kawn inkar kawngah hian lirthei eng chi pawh tlan phalloh (Road Block) a ni tih thupek ka chhuah e.

He thupek hi zawm lo an awm a nih chuan MV Act Section-179 hmangin an chungah dan anga hmalak a ni ang.

Tin, he thupek hian Magistrate/Police/F&ES leh medical emergency duty lirthei chevel te a huam lovang.

Attachment
